title: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.
notes: Choosing [gold]Immerse[/gold] initiates a looping phase where you can repeatedly [gold]Linger[/gold] or safely [gold]Exit Baths[/gold]. Each immersion and linger grants [green]2 Max HP[/green] but also inflicts [red]damage[/red] (unblockable, unpowered) that increases each time: the net cost after the Max HP gain is [red]1 HP[/red] on first immersion, then [red]2 HP, 3 HP, 4 HP[/red], etc. on each subsequent linger. The linger count is capped at 9, with increasingly surreal descriptions as you lose track of time. When the next linger would reduce your current HP to 0 or below, the event shows a [sine][red]death warning[/red][/sine] page but still offers the choice to linger (and die) or exit safely. [gold]Abstain[/gold] is the safer initial choice, granting [green]10 HP[/green] healing immediately without entering the baths.
